title: salix × canescens
intro: Salix × canescens, also known as weeping willow or grey willow, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Salix alba and Salix fragilis species. The bark of Salix × canescens contains salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, which provides its medicinal properties. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, pain, and fever, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. Salix × canescens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions to utilize its health benefits, making it a valuable natural remedy in folk medicine.
